mapper.sql: id, code, creator_id, used_by, used_at, expired_at, max_uses, use_count, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_invite_code WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM blog_invite_code WHERE code = #{code} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM blog_invite_code WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM blog_invite_code WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (expired_at IS NULL OR expired_at > NOW()) AND use_count < max_uses ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_invite_code WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (expired_at IS NULL OR expired_at > NOW()) AND use_count < max_uses

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_invite_code WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_invite_code (code, creator_id, expired_at, max_uses, use_count, created_at, updated_at, version) VALUES (#{code}, #{creatorId}, #{expiredAt}, #{maxUses}, 0, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_invite_code SET used_by = #{usedBy}, used_at = NOW(), use_count = use_count + 1, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND use_count < max_uses AND (expired_at IS NULL OR expired_at > NOW())
UPDATE blog_invite_code SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
